response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified two main segments containing the song 'Koi ni Ochite -Fall in love-'. 2. Identified the intro segment (00:00-00:34) and the full performance segment (00:51-04:59). 3. The segment (00:35-00:50) is a transition screen. 4. Confirmed the song metadata using on-screen text ('Lyrics: 湯川れい子 Music: 小林明子') and searched for lyrics for '恋におちて -Fall in love-'. 5. Compiled the lyrics and constructed the final JSON.
response.global_summary: A video performance by IRyS, featuring a short introductory segment with Houshou Marine and Inugami Korone, followed by a full vocal performance of the song 'Koi ni Ochite -Fall in love-' by IRyS.

scenes.description: IRyS, Houshou Marine, and Inugami Korone sing the beginning of 'Koi ni Ochite -Fall in love-' during an intro performance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もしも願いが叶うなら
吐息を白いバラに変えて
逢えない日には 部屋じゅうに
飾りましょう
貴方を想いながら
Darling, I want you
逢いたくて ときめく恋に
駆け出しそうなの
迷子のように 立ちすくむ
わたしをすぐに 届けたくて
ダイヤル回して 手を止めた
I'm just a woman
Fall in love
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If my wishes could come true
I'd change my sighs into white roses
On the days I can't meet you
I would decorate the whole room with them
While thinking of you
Darling, I want you
I want to meet you, I feel like running out
Into a heart-throbbing love
I'm standing still like a lost child
I want to reach you immediately
I dialed the number, but stopped my hand
I'm just a woman
Fall in love

scenes.description: An animated transition screen featuring the text 'You are watching ERB TV'. No vocal music is playing.
IRyS performs a full version of the song 'Koi ni Ochite -Fall in love-' on stage.

土曜の夜と日曜の

ダイヤル回して 手を止めた
I'm just a woman

Don't you remember
When you were here
Without a thinking
We were caught in fire
I've got a love song but
Where it goes
Three loving hearts are
Pullin' apart of one
Can't stop you

Can't wait no more
I'm just a woman
Fall in love
